invariants.scq-01: course count equals middle+high release course counts
invariants.scq-02: every standard has a materialized domain; middle standards have 2-5 aligned topics and high standards retain one candidate topic
invariants.scq-05: all middle and high learning relations are materialized with qualified semantics
invariants.scq-07: transition count equals the reviewed middle-high bridge release count
invariants.scq-09: choice rows include kind, minimum, optional maximum, course, and basis
invariants.scq-10: three effective high-school credit rules include kind, value, unit, and dates
invariants.scq-13: illustrative pathways return step order, kind, reason, and course or choice set
invariants.scq-15: every official standard locator returns page, attachment, SHA-256, section, and source
invariants.scq-19: elementary topic IRIs remain canonical and the pinned mathematics bridge returns 19 alignments
